speaker: speaker1
text: Mary , it's good to see you !

speaker: speaker2
text: Josh and I were just on our way back home from the beach and thought we'd drop by .

speaker: speaker1
text: I am so glad that you decided to stop by !

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , it has been a long time since we have seen you .

speaker: speaker1
text: Mary , can I get Josh or you something to drink ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh no , thank you . We aren't all that thirsty .

speaker: speaker1
text: How about a little snack then ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , thank you , we just ate lunch a little while ago .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well then , how is your family ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Everyone is doing great . My sister finally had her baby .
